items.title: Publisher pulls horror novel ‘Shy Girl’ over AI concerns
items.summary: A publisher has withdrawn a horror novel, 'Shy Girl,' from publication due to concerns about the potential use of AI in its creation, highlighting growing ethical and copyright issues in the industry.

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: OpenAI has enhanced its Responses API by integrating a computer environment, allowing models to act as more capable agents by interacting with external tools and systems.

items.title: Video-CoE: Reinforcing Video Event Prediction via Chain of Events
items.summary: Researchers introduce Video-CoE, a novel framework that improves video event prediction by leveraging a chain-of-events approach to better understand temporal dynamics.

items.title: Why Wall Street wasn't won over by Nvidia's big conference
items.summary: Despite a major conference, Wall Street analysts remained unconvinced by Nvidia's latest announcements, indicating potential concerns about future growth or market saturation in the AI hardware sector.

items.title: Memento-Skills: Let Agents Design Agents
items.summary: A new research paper explores Memento-Skills, a framework enabling AI agents to design and refine other agents, pushing the boundaries of autonomous AI development.

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Google Search now features an 'AI Mode' with Canvas, allowing users to generate and refine ideas, write, and code directly within the search interface.

items.title: Bridging Semantic and Kinematic Conditions with Diffusion-based Discrete Motion Tokenizer
items.summary: New research introduces a diffusion-based discrete motion tokenizer that effectively bridges semantic and kinematic conditions, advancing realistic and controllable motion generation.

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair is leveraging OpenAI's technology to significantly improve the accuracy of its product catalog and accelerate customer support operations, demonstrating practical AI application in e-commerce.

items.title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
items.summary: AI compliance firm Delve faces accusations of providing 'fake compliance' to customers, raising serious questions about trust and accountability in the burgeoning AI governance market.

items.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.
items.summary: A new report highlights a free alternative, 'Goose,' that offers similar code generation capabilities to the expensive Claude Code, potentially disrupting the market for AI coding assistants.

items.title: LVOmniBench: Pioneering Long Audio-Video Understanding Evaluation for Omnimodal LLMs
items.summary: LVOmniBench is introduced as a new benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the long audio-video understanding capabilities of omnimodal large language models.

items.title: The creator of Claude Code just revealed his workflow, and developers are losing their minds
items.summary: The workflow of Claude Code's creator has been unveiled, captivating developers with its innovative approach to AI-assisted coding and sparking widespread discussion.

items.title: MonoArt: Progressive Structural Reasoning for Monocular Articulated 3D Reconstruction
items.summary: Researchers present MonoArt, a method for progressive structural reasoning that significantly improves monocular articulated 3D reconstruction from single-view images.

items.title: Cubic Discrete Diffusion: Discrete Visual Generation on High-Dimensional Representation Tokens
items.summary: Cubic Discrete Diffusion proposes a novel approach for discrete visual generation by operating on high-dimensional representation tokens, enhancing the quality and control of generated images.

items.title: Building Production AI Agents with LangGraph: Beyond the Toy Examples (2026)
items.summary: This article delves into practical strategies for building robust, production-ready AI agents using LangGraph, moving beyond simple demonstrations to real-world applications.
